title: SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 8A Project
tagline: Build a mini application using SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 8A
description: Create a working SQL & Databases application demonstrating SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 8A.
starterCode:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 8A
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 8A' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
solution:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 8A
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 8A' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
solutionExpl: This solution demonstrates clean application of SQL & Databases Core Principles Part 8A in SQL & Databases.
